name: CheQ Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Select brands on CheQ (Amazon, Flipkart, Zomato, BigBasket, Apple via Unicorn)
CheQ Travel bookings and utility bill payments on CheQ app
Other eligible shopping, dining, food delivery, and online grocery spends
CheQ UPI on linked RuPay card

exclusions: Utility payments made outside the CheQ app
UPI transactions made outside the CheQ app
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹150 on fuel spends
Zero processing fee on Xpress EMI conversions
additionalDetails: CheQ points are typically credited within 2-3 working days after the transaction is completed and settled.
Base rewards are uncapped, while accelerated categories share a cap of 12,000 CheQ points per month.
Bill-payment redemptions on the CheQ app work at 4 CheQ Points = ₹1 and are available within 2 days of monthly statement generation.

salaried: Resident Indian with credit score 750+ and address in an AU Bank serviceable area
selfEmployed: Resident Indian with credit score 750+ and address in an AU Bank serviceable area

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-25.
Audited against the official AU Small Finance Bank product page and the official CheQ co-branded product page on 2026-06-18.
A single application issues 2 cards: 1 Visa variant and 1 RuPay variant.
Accelerated reward points are capped at 12,000 CheQ points per month across accelerated categories; base rewards are not capped.

The 12% select-brand row is modeled as partner merchants rather than broad online/grocery; Amazon keeps full focused credit through acceleratedShare.amazon = 1, while broad online is blended at 0.2 and dining blends at 0.25 to account for Zomato (12%) vs other dining (5%), while grocery does not receive generic 12% accelerated credit.
Reward points are valid for 2 years from the date they are credited into the CheQ account.
The 12% select-brand earn applies on Amazon, Flipkart, Zomato, BigBasket, and Apple products powered by Unicorn on the Visa variant, and through CheQ UPI using the CheQ AU RuPay Credit Card.
CheQ points can be redeemed on flights and hotels at 2 points = ₹1, on gift cards at 2 points = ₹1, and on monthly bill payments at 4 points = ₹1.
The LED Visa variant carries a one-time issuance fee of ₹999; standard Visa and RuPay cards do not carry that one-time issuance fee.
Both cards must be closed together; partial closure is not supported.
